overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city environment. The character moves from a sunlit intersection with elevated highways and neon signage into a progressively darker underpass area where a group of people are gathered playing a board game.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban intersection with elevated highway overpass

events.description: pedestrian in orange jacket crosses the path walking toward the intersection
maroon van drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection toward commercial buildings on the other side

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket and camouflage pants walking across the crosswalk
maroon van driving along the street past the intersection

entered.detail: green and white commercial building with red 'FOODSCAPE' signage
massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the street
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a red demon face advertisement
modern street lamp with orange glowing light fixture
tall palm tree near the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright sunlit intersection in a futuristic city. The Foodscape restaurant stands ahead beneath an elevated highway, while a digital billboard with a red demon face glows on the left. Pedestrians and vehicles move through the intersection as the character proceeds forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside commercial buildings with neon signage

events.description: camera turns left to follow the street alongside the Foodscape building
moving into the shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Foodscape restaurant, moving into shadow

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with horizontal green neon light strips running along its length

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks along the sidewalk beside the Foodscape restaurant. The environment transitions from open intersection to a street bordered by a distinctive green neon-lit wall on the right. The lighting gradually dims as the character moves deeper under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded street under elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering deep shadow under the overpass, ambient light drops significantly
turning left to follow a pedestrian into the underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass following a pedestrian in white clothing toward a distant orange smoke plume

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and shorts walking ahead into the shaded underpass area

entered.detail: dark multi-story building covered with multiple illuminated advertisement screens
large cloud of orange-tinted smoke rising in the distance between buildings
tall modern tower with distinctive geometric architecture and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper under the massive highway overpass where natural light mixes with shadows. A building covered in digital screens lines the left side while an orange smoke plume rises in the distance. The character follows a pedestrian in white clothing as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed and dim.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gathering space under highway with informal seating

events.description: entering informal gathering area with people sitting at folding tables under the overpass
slowing down and approaching a group playing a board game

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a group of men playing a strategy board game at folding tables

notable_agents.action: group of four men sitting around a folding table playing a board game with bottle caps
man in red tank top with tattoos standing and watching the game

entered.detail: concrete staircase with bright yellow painted sides leading up to the highway
glowing green cube-shaped hologram displaying a rotating advertisement
metal folding tables set up for the game players
scattered cardboard pieces and paper trash littering the gravel ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit gathering space beneath the highway where several people are seated at folding tables playing a board game. A yellow staircase and glowing green holographic advertisement illuminate the area. The character slows to observe the group playing amidst scattered cardboard debris on the gravel ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit futuristic intersection into the dim, enclosed shadows of a highway underpass. It begins by moving through a bustling crossing featuring the Foodscape restaurant and a glowing red demon billboard, before turning left to follow the sidewalk. As the character proceeds, the open sunlight gradually fades into a mix of shadows and artificial light, passing a green neon wall and a building lined with digital screens while orange smoke rises in the distance. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera follows a pedestrian deeper beneath the massive overpass structure. Finally, the scene opens into a dimly lit gathering space where the light shifts to yellow and green holograms, revealing a group of people playing a board game amidst cardboard debris on a gravel floor.
